Workflow for making changes to files in the repository on GitHub, in the order Issue → commit → PR.

All artifacts produced by this workflow (Issue title and body, commit messages, PR title and body) must be written in English. See [.github/CONTRIBUTING.md](/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) for the language policy.

## Step 1: Check or create an Issue

Check whether an Issue for the work already exists. If not, create one using the template.
[.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/task-issue.md](/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/task-issue.md)

## Step 2: Branch & Commit

Read the commit & branch rules and follow them when creating branches and making commits.
[.github/policies/commit-and-branch.md](/.github/policies/commit-and-branch.md)

## Step 3: Push & open a PR

Once all work within the scope of the Issue is complete, open a PR using the PR template.
[.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/task-pull-request.md](/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/task-pull-request.md)
